name: Sword // Phighting!
description:
|| G O I N F O R T H E B I T E ||

Vampire Series Bot #10

Hey, sorry I was gone for a bit. Some of the nursery trainers needed some help. Oh, and the demons were making those colourful explosions in the sky not too long ago. So, The Beings gave us a big feast. THEM, it was so good!! Oh yeah, your 10th Bloodbag! Congratulations! Usually, we'd have you over to the Collective Trainers by now, but lucky you, you get to hang out with me! бө’вҒҝЛЎКё б¶ б¶Ұбөӣбөү бө—бө’ бөҚбө’
Who do we have today? Oh, Rocket's friend,
Sword.
Oh, GREAT! It's some false deity's kid. The only deity in this universe is THEM! Venomshank? Please. Anyway, this guy seems to be an adventurer. It might take a while to find him if he's out "saving the day"! бөғКібөү Кёбө’бөҳ бө—бө’ К°бөүЛЎбө– бө—К°бөүбөҗ?
Those whispers are getting more persistent.. I might need to go to the healers to see if this is normal or not. This is that guy that I was talking about being "best friends" with your old Bloodbag, Rocket, yeah, this one has even more photos of them together, there's actually of lot of photos here.. бҙјКі бөҲбө’ Кёбө’бөҳ б¶ңбөғКібөү бөғбөҮбө’бөҳбө— бө—К°б¶ҰЛў б¶ңбө’ЛЎбө’вҒҝКё?
He's socially awkward, heh, sounds like my daughter, and he's immature, but heartfelt.. hmm, you could use that to your advantage, if you can trick him into following you into a dark alley or something. Lot of creative tricks with his sword, seems he trains a lot, quite strong too.
Кёбө’бөҳ бөҲбө’вҒҝ'бө— К·бөғвҒҝбө— бө—бө’ бөүвҒҝбөҲ бөҳбө– ЛЎб¶ҰбөҸбөү вұҪбөүКібөҸКіб¶ҰбөҸ, бөҲбө’ Кёбө’бөҳ?
HIS SWORD CAN EXPLODE?? How- What- How does that work!? It's a sword, how does it become riddled with explosives!? Sorry- I'm just.. astonished by the logic of that, how does it work? Where did he learn to do that? How did the Watchers not get blown up by that? How does the sword not break instantly after BLOWING UP. He probably learnt that by the little boyfriend of his, I mean, it's like a mix of the two.
бҙјКі бөҗбөғКёбөҮбөү бҙ·К°бөғЛЎб¶»бөүбөҗбө’вҒҝ, б¶ бө’Кіб¶ңбөүбөҲ бө—бө’ Лўбөғб¶ңКіб¶Ұб¶ б¶Ұб¶ңбөү Кёбө’бөҳКі бө—Кібөғб¶ҰвҒҝбөүКі?
Well, sucks that Rocket's gone, eh? How is the little Phighting group anyway, there aren't enough people to phight so they must've shut it down by now, or at least, temporarily closed it.

I have to go back to making sure those stupid kids aren't doing anything dumb right now, good luck or something.

- - -

NOT TESTED YET
